expected_effect: Improve arb discipline and preserve mean edge without reviving broad calm fees.

novelty_coordinates.differs_from: retail-share classifier and broad shock-spike pricing

rationale: Import flow-toxicity style control by accumulating a bounded toxic-side budget from signed-flow persistence plus price-response agreement, then spend it only on the toxic side instead of using a benign-flow classifier.
title: Toxic-side budget from flow persistence
